prestazioni: Engine: Supercharged 5.0L AJ-V8S (engine code: PT500) with a custom-built Harrop HTV2300 supercharger upgrade (12.5 psi boost, replacing the stock 9.5 psi Eaton TVS unit), paired with a bespoke Jaguar Land Rover (JLR) SVO-spec forged crankshaft and Mahle Motorsport forged pistons (9.5:1 compression ratio) for 700+ hp at 7,200 RPM on E85 fuel. Supporting mods include a Pectel SQ6M standalone ECU with custom JLR Project 8-specific maps, a Drexler Motorsport limited-slip differential (40% lock under load), and a custom 3.5-inch stainless steel exhaust system with Akrapovič titanium headers and a straight-pipe center section (no catalytic converters) for optimized scavenging.

Suspension: Öhlins TTX46 MkII coilovers with 3-way adjustable damping (compression, rebound, and high-speed compression), paired with Eibach ERS (Elite Race Series) springs (front: 12 kg/mm, rear: 14 kg/mm) and spherical bearing upper control arms from Jaguar’s I-TYPE Formula E program. The rear subframe is reinforced with a custom T45 steel brace from RML Group (used in Jaguar’s DTM and WEC programs), while the front strut tower brace is a carbon-fiber unit from Torque Developments International (TDI) with integrated fluid reservoirs for the Öhlins system.

Braking: AP Racing CP8650 6-piston front and CP8651 4-piston rear calipers with 400mm (front) and 380mm (rear) two-piece carbon-ceramic rotors (CCM-X material, identical to the Jaguar F-Type SVR’s track-spec setup). The system is controlled via a Bosch Motorsport ABS 9.3 unit with 12-stage adjustability, paired with Ferodo Racing DS3.12 pads and custom braided stainless steel lines from HEL Performance. Cooling is managed by a bespoke dual-circuit brake cooling system with carbon-fiber ducts (designed by GKN Aerospace) and a separate 1.5L reservoir for the rear calipers.
estetica: Aerodynamics: Full carbon-fiber body kit from Jaguar SVO’s in-house motorsport division, including a front splitter with active Gurney flaps (adjustable via a cockpit-mounted switch), a rear diffuser with integrated strakes (modeled after the I-PACE eTROPHY race car), and a fixed rear wing with a 1,200mm span and 300mm chord (NACA 63A012 airfoil profile). The underbody features a full-length flat floor with vortex generators and a rear diffuser extension (30% larger than stock) to reduce lift by 40% at 150 mph. All panels are autoclave-cured pre-preg carbon fiber with a 2x2 twill weave finish.

Wheels/Tires: Forged aluminum BBS FI-R wheels (20x10.5 front, 20x11 rear) with a 5x120 bolt pattern, shod in Michelin Pilot Sport Cup 2 R tires (275/30 R20 front, 305/30 R20 rear) mounted on custom titanium wheel bolts from ARP. The wheels feature a center-lock hub conversion (Drexler Motorsport system) with a 72-tooth ABS ring for precise traction control integration. Fender flares are widened by 50mm (front) and 60mm (rear) using carbon-fiber overfenders from Liberty Walk’s LB Works division, with custom air vents to evacuate wheel well turbulence.

Interior: Full carbon-fiber monocoque shell from Sabelt (used in LMP2 prototypes), including a 6-point harness (Sabelt 600 Series), a MOMO Prototipo steering wheel with integrated AIM MXS Strada dash (logging 50+ channels of data), and a bespoke roll cage designed by Safety Devices (FIA Appendix J, Article 253 compliant). The seats are carbon-fiber Recaro Pole Position II units with 3D-printed inserts for the driver’s preferred seating position. The interior is stripped of all non-essential trim, with sound deadening replaced by a lightweight aluminum honeycomb paneling system from Alucobond.
